why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before stack-depth decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Big blind is the seat anchor because the forced defender carries the widest and most pressured range in this out-of-position spot.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The big blind is the right anchor here because the forced defender carries the widest, most pressured range in this out-of-position spot.
